title: RPCSEC_GSS Version 2
abstract: This document describes version 2 of the RPCSEC_GSS protocol.  Version 2 is the same as version 1 (specified in RFC 2203) except that support for channel bindings has been added.  RPCSEC_GSS allows remote procedure call (RPC) protocols to access the Generic Security Services Application Programming Interface (GSS-API). [STANDARDS-TRACK]
